title: Getting Started
text: downloadR echoverse module provides single- multi-threaded downloading functions R. wraps several download backends including axel (multi-threaded), wget, R’s built-download.file. also provides convenience functions working AWS S3, Figshare, Zenodo repositories.

title: Getting Started
text: core function downloader() supports variety download backends. multi-threaded downloads single file, use axel method.
code: input_url <- paste(     "https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/Fine_Mapping",     "raw/master/Data/lead.SNP.coords.csv", sep = "/") out_path <- downloadR::downloader(input_url = input_url,                                   download_method = "download.file",                                   nThread = 1) #> Downloading with download.file. #> download.file download successful. #> Time difference of 0.1 secs csv <- utils::read.csv(out_path) knitr::kable(head(csv))

title: Getting Started
text: single-threaded downloads, can use wget download.file.
code: out_path2 <- downloadR::downloader(input_url = input_url,                                    download_method = "download.file",                                    force_overwrite = TRUE) #> Downloading with download.file. #> download.file download successful. #> Time difference of 0.1 secs

title: Getting Started
text: download_vcf() specialised function downloading Variant Call Format (VCF) files. automatically attempts download VCF tabix index file (.tbi), available.
code: vcf_url <- "https://gwas.mrcieu.ac.uk/files/ieu-a-298/ieu-a-298.vcf.gz" out_paths <- downloadR::download_vcf(vcf_url = vcf_url)

title: Getting Started
text: load_rdata() convenience function can read .rda, .rdata, .rds files either local remote path. Remote files downloaded automatically loading.
code: fileName <- paste0(     "https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/",     "Fine_Mapping_Shiny/raw/master/www/BST1.finemap_DT.RDS") dat <- downloadR::load_rdata(fileName) knitr::kable(head(dat, 3))

title: Getting Started
text: aws() function downloads files Amazon S3 buckets using aws.s3 package.
code: bucket <- "s3://broad-alkesgroup-ukbb-ld/" input_url <- "UKBB_LD/chr10_135000001_138000001.gz" out <- downloadR::aws(input_url = input_url, bucket = bucket)

title: Getting Started
text: figshare_list() queries Figshare API list downloadable files repository.
code: files <- downloadR::figshare_list(id = "14703003") #> Searching for files in Figshare repo: 14703003 #> 18 file(s) found. knitr::kable(files[, c("name", "size")])

title: Getting Started
text: figshare_download() combines listing downloading one step.
code: files <- downloadR::figshare_download(     id = "14703003",     suffix = "Earthworm_sFig1_cluster_marker.xlsx")

title: Getting Started
text: zenodo_list() retrieves metadata files Zenodo record. Requires Zenodo personal access token (set via zenodo_token environment variable passed directly).
code: zen_dat <- downloadR::zenodo_list(     token = "<your-token>",     concept_doi = "10.5281/zenodo.7062237")

title: Getting Started
text: zenodo_upload() creates new Zenodo record, uploads files, publishes.
code: files <- sapply(seq_len(3), function(i) {     tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".txt")     writeLines(letters, tmp)     return(tmp) }) zout <- downloadR::zenodo_upload(     files = files,     title = "test_repo")

what: downloadR: Echoverse module: Single- and multi-threaded downloading functions.
title: Echoverse Module: Single- and Multi-Threaded Downloading Functions
text: R package part echoverse suite supports echolocatoR: automated genomic fine-mapping pipeline. use downloadR, please cite: Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: automated end--end statistical functional genomic fine-mapping pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658

title: Echoverse Module: Single- and Multi-Threaded Downloading Functions
code: if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")  BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/downloadR") library(downloadR)

title: Echoverse Module: Single- and Multi-Threaded Downloading Functions
text: Brian M. Schilder, Bioinformatician IIRaj LabDepartment Neuroscience, Icahn School Medicine Mount Sinai

title: AWS downloader — aws
text: AWS S3 bucket downloader.

title: AWS downloader — aws
code: aws(   input_url,   output_path = file.path(tempdir(), basename(input_url)),   bucket,   force_overwrite = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: AWS downloader — aws
text: input_url URL remote file. output_path file name want save download . bucket Character string name bucket, object class “s3_bucket”. force_overwrite Overwrite existing file. verbose Print messages. ... Arguments passed aws.s3::save_object object Character string object key, object class “s3_object”. cases, object specified latter, bucket can omitted bucket name extracted “Bucket” slot object. headers List request headers REST call. file R connection, file name specifying local file save object . overwrite logical indicating whether overwrite file. Passed write_disk. Default TRUE.

title: AWS downloader — aws
text: Path file downloaded

title: AWS downloader — aws
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ bucket <- "s3://broad-alkesgroup-ukbb-ld/" input_url <- "UKBB_LD/chr10_135000001_138000001.gz" out <- aws(input_url = input_url, bucket = bucket) } # }

title: axel downloader — axel
text: R wrapper axel, enables multi-threaded download  single large file.

title: axel downloader — axel
code: axel(   input_url,   output_path,   axel_path = "axel",   background = FALSE,   force_overwrite = FALSE,   quiet = TRUE,   alternate = TRUE,   check_certificates = FALSE,   conda_env = "echoR_mini",   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: axel downloader — axel
text: input_url URL remote file. output_path file name want save download . background Run background force_overwrite Overwrite existing file. quiet Run quietly. alternate alternate, check_certificates check_certificates conda_env Conda environment use. nThread Number threads parallelize . verbose Print messages.

title: axel downloader — axel
text: Path file downloaded

title: Check tool availability — check_avail
text: Check whether tool installed usable command line simply invoking name. , try find executable tool via specified conda_env. Finally, executable can found, simply return NULL.

title: Check tool availability — check_avail
code: check_avail(tool, conda_env = "echoR_mini", verbose = TRUE)

title: Check tool availability — check_avail
text: tool Tool name, full path tool executable. conda_env Conda environments search . NULL (default), search conda environments. verbose Print messages.

what: Download a remote VCF file and its index file — download_vcf
title: Download a remote VCF file and its index file — download_vcf
text: Download remote VCF file index file

title: Download a remote VCF file and its index file — download_vcf
code: download_vcf(   vcf_url,   vcf_dir = tempdir(),   download_method = "download.file",   force_new = FALSE,   quiet = TRUE,   nThread = 1 )

title: Download a remote VCF file and its index file — download_vcf
text: vcf_url Remote URL VCF file. vcf_dir download VCF file. download_method "axel" : Multi-threaded "wget" : Single-threaded "download.file" : Single-threaded "internal" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) "wininet" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) "libcurl" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) "curl" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) force_new Overwrite previously downloaded VCF path name. quiet Run quietly. nThread Number threads parallelize .

title: Download a remote VCF file and its index file — download_vcf
text: List containing paths downloaded VCF index file.

title: Download a remote VCF file and its index file — download_vcf
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ vcf_url <- "https://gwas.mrcieu.ac.uk/files/ieu-a-298/ieu-a-298.vcf.gz" out_paths <- download_vcf(vcf_url = vcf_url) } # }

title: downloader wrapper — downloader
text: R wrapper "axel" (multi-threaded)  "download.file" (single-threaded) download functions.

title: downloader wrapper — downloader
code: downloader(   input_url,   output_dir = tempdir(),   output_path = file.path(output_dir, basename(input_url)),   download_method = c("axel", "wget", "download.file", "internal", "wininet", "libcurl",     "curl"),   retry_method = "download.file",   background = FALSE,   force_overwrite = FALSE,   quiet = TRUE,   show_progress = TRUE,   continue = TRUE,   alternate = TRUE,   check_certificates = TRUE,   timeout = 5 * 60,   conda_env = "echoR_mini",   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: downloader wrapper — downloader
text: input_url URL remote file. output_dir file directory want save download . output_path file name want save download . download_method "axel" : Multi-threaded "wget" : Single-threaded "download.file" : Single-threaded "internal" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) "wininet" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) "libcurl" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) "curl" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) retry_method Method automatically retry selected download_method fails. background Run background force_overwrite Overwrite existing file. quiet Run quietly. show_progress show_progress. continue continue. alternate alternate, check_certificates check_certificates timeout many seconds giving download. Passed download.file. Default: 30*60 (30min). conda_env Conda environment use. nThread Number threads parallelize . verbose Print messages.

title: downloader wrapper — downloader
text: Local path downloaded file. Named vector files, names URLs values paths respective local files.

title: downloader wrapper — downloader

title: load_rdata — load_rdata
text: Load processed data (.rda format) using function assigns specific variable (guess loaded variable name ). .rda file remote , first downloaded using downloader.

title: load_rdata — load_rdata
code: load_rdata(fileName, ...)

title: load_rdata — load_rdata
text: fileName Name file load. ... Arguments passed downloader input_url URL remote file. output_dir file directory want save download . output_path file name want save download . download_method "axel" : Multi-threaded "wget" : Single-threaded "download.file" : Single-threaded "internal" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) "wininet" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) "libcurl" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) "curl" : Single-threaded (passed download.file) retry_method Method automatically retry selected download_method fails. background Run background force_overwrite Overwrite existing file. quiet Run quietly. show_progress show_progress. continue continue. nThread Number threads parallelize . alternate alternate, check_certificates check_certificates timeout many seconds giving download. Passed download.file. Default: 30*60 (30min). conda_env Conda environment use. verbose Print messages.

title: load_rdata — load_rdata
text: R object

title: Zenodo upload — zenodo_upload
text: Search files upload Zenodo.

title: Zenodo upload — zenodo_upload
code: zenodo_upload(   files,   token = Sys.getenv("zenodo_token"),   title,   zipfile = file.path(tempdir(), title),   meta = list(title = title, description = "", uploadType = "dataset", Creator =     list(firstname = "", lastname = "", affiliation = "")),   sandbox = TRUE,   validate = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Zenodo upload — zenodo_upload
text: #### Installing zen4R #### ## system deps installed beforehand. sudo apt-get install raptor2-utils sudo apt-get install rasqal-utils sudo apt-get install librdf0-dev

title: Zenodo upload — zenodo_upload
text: files Paths files upload Zenodo. token Zenodo  Personal access token. title Metadata field: title Zenodo repo. zipfile Name zipped file containing files. allows users preview folder hierarchy Zenodo website. meta Additional Zenodo repo metadata. sandbox Whether use Zenodo Zenodo Sandbox API. validate Whether validate files published. verbose Print messages.

title: Zenodo upload — zenodo_upload
code: files <- sapply(seq_len(3), function(i){     tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".txt")     writeLines(letters, tmp)     return(tmp) }) if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ zout <- zenodo_upload(files=files,                       title="test_repo") } # }

title: downloadR 1.0.0
text: Gracefully handle conda env creation failure check_avail. Fix Rd formatting \dontrun{} example guards. Add Rplots.pdf *.tbi .gitignore.

title: downloadR 0.99.9
text: Local R CMD check fixes compatibility updates.

title: downloadR 0.99.8
text: Standardize rworkflows.yml canonical template: enable Docker ghcr.io, set write-permissions, use GITHUB_TOKEN, add devel branch trigger. Remove tracked .DS_Store files.

title: downloadR 0.99.7
text: Add aws function

title: downloadR 0.99.6
text: Add rworkflows

title: downloadR 0.99.5
text: zenodo_list zenodo_upload figshare_links Can now takes lists files Made subfunction downloader_one Passing CRAN checks locally.

title: downloadR 0.99.5
text: Update .gitignore .Rbuilignore matcho echoannot Change conda_env: “echoR” –> “echoR_mini”

title: downloadR 0.99.4
text: Default now nThread=1. Ensure existing files get sent back immediately. load_rdata: Extend local/remote rda/rds files. validate_file: New function validate file presence size. downloader: New arg retry_method.

title: downloadR 0.99.4
text: Reassign output_path appropriate new arg output_dir. Update README badges.

title: downloadR 0.99.3
text: downloader_check_method check_avail Optionally tool executable paths axel wget, reduce number times echoconda::find_packages run.

title: downloadR 0.99.3
text: Fix echoconda::find_packages (now returns data.table).

title: downloadR 0.99.2
text: Update echoconda function name: env_from_yaml –> yaml_to_env

title: downloadR 0.99.1
text: Update GHA. Update echoconda::findpackage –> echoconda::findpackages Add hex sticker. Update README template. Remove docs/.

title: downloadR 0.99.0
text: Added NEWS.md file track changes package. Added axel, wget, download.file methods.
